tasks.subject: Task 0: Repo scaffold + PostGIS container
tasks.description:
**Goal:** docker compose up db gives a running PostGIS DB.

**Files:** docker-compose.yml, db/Dockerfile, .env.example, .gitignore

**Verify:** docker compose exec db psql -c 'SELECT postgis_version();'

```json:metadata
{"files":["docker-compose.yml","db/Dockerfile",".env.example",".gitignore"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose exec db psql -U somelec -d sig_somelec -c \"SELECT postgis_version();\"","acceptanceCriteria":["PostGIS container healthy","psql connects and returns version"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Core schema — 7 MCD tables
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 7 simplified-MCD tables, SRID 32628 geometry, GIST indexes.

**Files:** db/migrations/001_schema.sql

**Verify:** \dt shows 7 tables; Find_SRID returns 32628

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/001_schema.sql"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose exec db psql -U somelec -d sig_somelec -c \"\\dt\"","acceptanceCriteria":["7 tables created","geom SRID 32628 + GIST","FK chain correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Reference tables, params, line attribution
tasks.description:
**Goal:** parametre, ampacite_cable, nullable ligne.transfo_id, niveau_tension seed.

**Files:** db/migrations/002_reference.sql

**Verify:** SELECT cle,valeur FROM parametre lists 4 coefficients

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/002_reference.sql"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose exec db psql -U somelec -d sig_somelec -c \"SELECT cle,valeur FROM parametre ORDER BY cle;\"","acceptanceCriteria":["4 params","ampacity lookup","ligne.transfo_id nullable FK","voltages seeded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Nouakchott seed with trap transformer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sample data incl. TR-TRAP (overloaded) and a normal transformer.

**Files:** db/seed/010_nouakchott.sql

**Verify:** TR-TRAP kva=160 with 350kW of points; TR-NORMAL kva=630 with 200kW

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/seed/010_nouakchott.sql"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose exec db psql -U somelec -d sig_somelec -c \"SELECT code_actif,puissance_kva FROM transformateur;\"","acceptanceCriteria":[">=2 postes >=3 transfos","TR-TRAP taux>1","one normal transfo"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Load heuristic views + SQL tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** v_charge_transformateur and v_charge_ligne compute taux_charge/classe; verified.

**Files:** db/migrations/003_views.sql, api/package.json, api/src/db.js, api/test/views.test.js

**Verify:** cd api && npm test -- test/views.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/003_views.sql","api/package.json","api/src/db.js","api/test/views.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"cd api && npm test -- test/views.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["TR-TRAP critique","TR-NORMAL normal","attributed line numeric, unattributed inconnu","zero-kVA guard"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Express skeleton + health
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Express app with /health and pg pool.

**Files:** api/src/server.js, api/test/health.test.js

**Verify:** cd api && npm test -- test/health.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["api/src/server.js","api/test/health.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"cd api && npm test -- test/health.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /health 200 db:true","port from API_PORT"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Vector tile route via ST_AsMVT
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /tiles/:layer/:z/:x/:y.pbf returns MVT for transfo and ligne.

**Files:** api/src/tiles.js, api/src/server.js, api/test/tiles.test.js

**Verify:** cd api && npm test -- test/tiles.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["api/src/tiles.js","api/src/server.js","api/test/tiles.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"cd api && npm test -- test/tiles.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["transfo tile 200/204 protobuf","unknown layer 400","bad coords 400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Dashboard aggregate API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /api/kpi, /api/top-surcharges, /api/asset/:type/:id.

**Files:** api/src/api.js, api/src/server.js, api/test/api.test.js

**Verify:** cd api && npm test -- test/api.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["api/src/api.js","api/src/server.js","api/test/api.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"cd api && npm test -- test/api.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["kpi counts","top-surcharges TR-TRAP first","unknown asset 404"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: React scaffold + API client + CORS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Vite React app boots and calls the API (CORS).

**Files:** web/package.json, web/vite.config.js, web/index.html, web/src/main.jsx, web/src/App.jsx, web/src/api.js, api/src/server.js

**Verify:** cd web && npm run build

```json:metadata
{"files":["web/package.json","web/vite.config.js","web/index.html","web/src/main.jsx","web/src/App.jsx","web/src/api.js","api/src/server.js"],"verifyCommand":"cd web && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["dev shows live KPI total","CORS header present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: MapLibre map with load styling + filter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Map renders transfo/ligne tiles colored by classe, overloads pop, legend + filter + popup.

**Files:** web/src/map/style.js, web/src/map/Map.jsx, web/src/App.jsx

**Verify:** Playwright via webapp-testing; TR-TRAP red

```json:metadata
{"files":["web/src/map/style.js","web/src/map/Map.jsx","web/src/App.jsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd web && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["critique red+large, surcharge amber, normal green, inconnu grey","overloaded-only filter","popup with taux"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Dashboard panel (KPI, top-10, histogram)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** KPI cards, clickable top-10 fly-to table, load histogram.

**Files:** web/src/dashboard/Dashboard.jsx, web/src/App.jsx, api/src/api.js

**Verify:** Playwright: top-10 has TR-TRAP, click recenters map

```json:metadata
{"files":["web/src/dashboard/Dashboard.jsx","web/src/App.jsx","api/src/api.js"],"verifyCommand":"cd web && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["KPI cards","top-10 fly-to","histogram","asset endpoint returns lng/lat"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: QGIS doc + full-stack compose
tasks.description:
**Goal:** QGIS connection guide + compose runs db+api+web end-to-end.

**Files:** qgis/README.md, docker-compose.yml, api/Dockerfile, web/Dockerfile

**Verify:** docker compose up -d then open http://localhost:5173

```json:metadata
{"files":["qgis/README.md","docker-compose.yml","api/Dockerfile","web/Dockerfile"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose up -d --build","acceptanceCriteria":["QGIS connection documented","full stack runs","app loads with seed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: ADRs + README + acceptance
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 4 ADRs, README quickstart, end-to-end trap acceptance.

**Files:** docs/decisions/0001..0004, README.md

**Verify:** acceptance script — SQL critique, API TR-TRAP, tile 200, web red

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/decisions/0001-postgis-source-of-truth.md","docs/decisions/0002-express-mvt-tiles.md","docs/decisions/0003-static-heuristic-vs-loadflow.md","docs/decisions/0004-ligne-load-attribution.md","README.md"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose exec db psql -U somelec -d sig_somelec -tAc \"SELECT classe FROM v_charge_transformateur WHERE code_actif='TR-TRAP';\"","acceptanceCriteria":["4 ADRs","README quickstart","end-to-end trap visible"]}
```
